checklist.item: Pull 1-3 real inbound replies from Instantly.ai
For each reply: copy Decision output fields (micro_intent, confidence, broad_category)
Run GeneratePayloadTemplate, fill in fields, validate each payload
For each payload: record what the shadow evaluator would decide
For each case: record your own assessment (should it have been blocked/eligible?)
For any disagreement: log in learning_signals array below
Export daily summary at end of session
